prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: reviewer visual cue for a governed finance SaaS cockpit. Primary request: Create a premium, dense, light-first Recoup deduction forensics product screen showing the Maya journey: top ToolStatusRail with SAP OData, TPM, 3PL POD, bureau, remittance, contract repo, MCP; a ranked 8-scenario worklist; a selected scenario evidence dossier with inline citation chips; a subordinate right-side MultimodalDock showing named sub-agents POD-Retriever, Contract-Reader, TPM-Matcher; an AuditVerifyChip. Style/medium: polished enterprise product mockup, not a marketing hero, no chatbot avatar. Composition/framing: 16:10 desktop app screenshot, left petrol sidebar, dense operational grid, right dock visible. Color palette: Recoup tokens only: petrol teal, white surfaces, warm-cool neutral canvas, status green/warning/danger/info. Typography feel: IBM Plex Sans UI, IBM Plex Mono for IDs and amounts, Newsreader only for tiny editorial edge labels. Constraints: no purple gradients, no beige dominant palette, no emoji, no anthropomorphic assistant, no decorative blobs, no fake live labels for synthetic sources, no invented product claims, no watermark. Text accuracy is secondary; visual hierarchy, density, and component anatomy are primary.

Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: reviewer visual cue for a governed finance SaaS cockpit. Primary request: Create a premium Recoup credit arbitration desktop screen for David: Sentinel alert Account-360 for Harbor, limit/order exposure header, DSO drift sparkline, bureau lien danger banner, partial-hold scoring visualizer with six weighted criteria, composite score, deterministic 55 percent release / 45 percent back-order split, Risk-Mesh negotiation graph with Supervisor, Credit, Fulfilment, Billing, Collections nodes, proactive terms action packet. Style/medium: sober executive operations software, data-dense, auditable, not a static report. Composition/framing: 16:10 desktop app screenshot, left petrol sidebar, score visualizer center, negotiation graph right/lower, action queue visible. Color palette: Recoup tokens only: petrol teal, white surfaces, neutral canvas, accent rust only for high-risk lien. Typography feel: IBM Plex Sans UI, IBM Plex Mono for scores, IDs, and amounts. Constraints: no model-computed dollar claims beyond visual placeholders, no purple/pink AI styling, no avatar, no decorative glow, no fake ERP write button, no watermark. Text accuracy is secondary; component anatomy and premium look are primary.

Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: reviewer visual cue for the only dark-mode surface in Recoup. Primary request: Create David D5 Command Centre: dark portfolio monitoring cockpit with exposure board, live bureau and behavioral signal rails, ToolStatusRail, active arbitrations, Harbor re-underwriting tile, breach-triggered Risk Mesh queue, audit status. Style/medium: restrained dark enterprise monitoring dashboard, premium and quiet, not sci-fi. Composition/framing: 16:10 desktop app screenshot, left dark sidebar, dense panels, clear status rail, subtle atmospheric mint only at edges. Color palette: Recoup dark tokens: deep green-black canvas, dark surface panels, mint teal primary, muted text, semantic status colors. Typography feel: IBM Plex Sans UI, IBM Plex Mono for numbers and hashes. Constraints: no neon purple, no cyberpunk, no animal/mascot/avatar, no fake autonomous execution, no decorative blobs, no watermark. Text accuracy is secondary; dark command-center mood and component anatomy are primary.

Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: reviewer visual cue for a governed finance SaaS executive readout. Primary request: Create Recoup CFO read-only summary: compact board metrics for gross-to-net, margin protected draft-only, recovered/in-flight/projected-prevented, DSO/CEI requires live ERP inputs; audit posture; open dependencies; what changed; AI insight; visible AuditVerifyChip and provenance labels. Style/medium: premium executive finance workspace, light-first, compact, auditable, not a marketing landing page. Composition/framing: 16:10 desktop app screenshot, left petrol sidebar, wide metric strip, audit panel, dependencies table, no dead whitespace. Color palette: Recoup tokens only: petrol teal, white surfaces, neutral canvas, status chips. Typography feel: IBM Plex Sans UI, IBM Plex Mono for money/hashes, Newsreader only for executive micro-label. Constraints: no hero illustration, no purple gradients, no fake live ERP label, no autonomous action buttons, no watermark. Text accuracy is secondary; hierarchy, executive restraint, and auditability are primary.
